message: Oh, right... Last night I was up late. I spent all night warning people on the underground message board.

name: Zakuro
message: "But no one would listen to the truth."
It was the day when I would recover my power...
The day I would be reborn.
I hadn't felt this good in a long time.
For a long time, I didn't feel anything.
I never knew the morning could feel so good...
I have to protect this happiness...
I have to protect this world.
I came to school since I had a lot of time before we were supposed to meet up.

name: Zakuro
message: "It's Sunday, so there aren't many people here..."
I walked into the school building.

name: Zakuro
message: "Even this place, where so many bad things happened, will be given new life after the great disaster passes."
Looking at it like that, even this school building holds a place in my heart, oddly enough.
The last time I looked out this window...
If he had been born with a kinder heart... he wouldn't have been eaten by the Specialized Physics Bug.
He won't be born into the new world.
This place holds my most treasured memories...
All my memories of Mamiya-kun linger here.

name: Zakuro
message: "I guess Mamiya-kun's not here now, though."
Of course not... Today is Sunday after all.

name: Zakuro
message: "I guess I still hoped he would be."
If we're fated to be together... It wouldn't be strange at all if we had met here today...

name: Zakuro
message: "Hehehe... I shouldn't be thinking about boys just before battle."
I'll soon be reborn... and then I'll fight for this world.
I can't waste my time thinking about the boy I used to like.
The two of us... in the new world...
Was that the first sign of my powers returning?

name: Usami
message: "The vanguard possesses humans in order to approach us and interfere with our mission..."
Which means... Otonashi-san came here to interfere with the Spiral Matai.

name: Zakuro
message: "I know all about your evil scheme!"

name: Zakuro
message: "You're here to interfere with the Spiral Matai, aren't you?"

name: Ayana
message: "You've already chosen your fate... There's nothing I can do to change it."

name: Zakuro
message: "O-Of course not... I'll never let you evil people interfere."

name: Ayana
message: "Either way... people aren't capable of accurately distinguishing between the coincidental and the inevitable."

name: Ayana
message: "All swans are white... That was the truth."

name: Ayana
message: "Until they found one black swan anyway."

name: Ayana
message: "The black swan... One fact can overturn a theory that was previously thought impregnable."

name: Ayana
message: "Some men believe that the Sun dies at the end of every day. They pray for its rebirth every night."

name: Ayana
message: "They believe themselves to be the only reason the Sun rises at dawn."

name: Ayana
message: "Not so long as they continue their prayers."

name: Ayana
message: "So no one can deny the truth you've found."

name: Zakuro
message: "You can't confuse me with your nonsense."

name: Ayana
message: "Oh, really... But there is one thing I'd like to say."

name: Ayana
message: "Do your best... at the Spiral Matai."

name: Zakuro
message: "I don't want to hear it from you!"
I never should've come back to school...
I never wanted to see this person ever again...
Now she's spoiled my good mood.
I thought I heard a voice... and I turned around...
To think that we would meet here... just before the end...
We last saw each other a few days ago, but in the span of just a few days, we had grown so distant.
No... We could still be separated until the end of time.
Just like Usami-chan was... That could still happen to us.
Mamiya-kun noticed me staring at him.
A kind smile... That's definitely the real him.

name: Mamiya
message: ""Oh, uh, there's no particular reason. I was buying something, and now I guess I'm just walking around.""

name: Mamiya
message: "I mean, for someone living near the train station, Suginomiya is the most convenient place to go shopping, right? I suppose you could go all the way out to Shinjuku if you wanted, though."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes. I'm glad I got to meet you."

name: Mamiya
message: "Um, we've never really talked much, so..."
That's probably it... It infects a person's brain and eats their thoughts, memories, and emotions...
Damn it... That bug ate my precious memories with Mamiya-kun...
Bick Hazard... I won't forgive you!

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah, no. You're right. You're probably right, but I knew you very well."

name: Mamiya
message: "Did I do something to tick you off?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Well, if someone I don't remember all that well says they remember me, it means they're holding some kind of grudge, right?"
Even after the bug ate his memories... he's still such a kind person...
He really is a nice person.

name: Zakuro
message: "A grudge against you? Heheh. I'm not holding any grudge."

name: Mamiya
message: "I see. Well, that's good to hear."

name: Zakuro
message: "I don't have a bad impression of you."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah. I hope we can have cordial relations."
I'll definitely come back to you... my beloved...
Next time, I'll tell you how I feel.
And then I'll come back to you.

name: Zakuro
message: "I'll give you some of my power."
By the way, what is that 'something amazing' you were talking about?"

name: Zakuro
message: "The sky is full of anxious words."
I told him about the scene I saw...

name: Mamiya
message: "Um, not full of anxiety, but full of anxious words?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Ah, well, I was just wondering if you liked it."

name: Zakuro
message: "Anxious words, and the world that has absorbed them."

name: Zakuro
message: "The heart of the person who will soon die."

name: Zakuro
message: "Sorry. I'm sorry. You probably can't believe it, right? But I'll protect you."

name: Usami
message: "What are you doing with an outsider?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Sorry. But this person should be fine."

name: Mamiya
message: "Ahahaha, well then, I'd better be off..."

name: Zakuro
message: "I won't fail. I can do it."
We quickly walked to the apartment building.
The apartment building would be the best place for us to receive energy from Elhimuro.
Soon it would be time for the Spiral Matai.
Ayumi-chan has never been talkative, but why is Usami-chan so quiet all of a sudden...?

name: Zakuro
message: "Today's the day we finally recover our power so that we can save the world."
I couldn't hear what she said.
Usami-chan started crying out of fear.
Did she just say we might die?
She continued crying. She wouldn't answer me.
I heard it was a ritual to recover our Extradimensional Powers...
I heard we would have a near-death experience...
But... just what kind of ritual is it? I still hadn't heard the details.

name: Zakuro
message: "Usami-chan... what kind of ritual is the Spiral Matai?"
She just kept crying in fear.

name: Usami
message: "In order to recover our powers, we have to come close to death, so we have to..."

name: Usami
message: "We have to... jump from the roof of this building."
Did she just say... we have to jump?
From the top of this building?
This building is at least fourteen stories...
If we jumped from that height...
Our bodies would crash against the ground, just like him...
No... This building is three times as tall as the one he fell from, so it would be much worse.
It would probably be a lot worse.

name: Usami
message: "No... If we do it, our powers will be awakened the instant before we reach the ground."

name: Usami
message: "Yes... Our power will never come back until we're faced with certain death."

name: Usami
message: "...B-But... But, I'm scared... I'm so scared!"
Jumping from the top of this building...
I grabbed Usami-chan and Ayumi-chan's arms.
I dragged the two of them into the elevator.

name: Zakuro
message: "It'll be all right, Usami-chan. What do we have to fear?"

name: Zakuro
message: "There's no way we'll die like he did..."

name: Zakuro
message: "We're angel warriors! It's our destiny to save the world!"

name: Zakuro
message: "What do we have to be afraid of?"

name: Zakuro
message: "We won't die, because we're the ones who are right!"

name: Zakuro
message: "All right? Usami-chan... right now, the world is sitting upon the cusp of destruction."

name: Zakuro
message: "If we don't stand up and fight, who will save the world in our stead?"

name: Zakuro
message: "If we don't fight back, the world will be annihilated."

name: Zakuro
message: "As long as we stand united, we can accomplish even the impossible!"

name: Zakuro
message: "If we don't fight back now, the world will be destroyed!"

name: Usami
message: "I can't see it... I can't see any great disaster!"

name: Zakuro
message: "It clouds the mind and beckons the worst possible outcome!"

name: Usami
message: "I don't care if the world is destroyed!"
I slapped Usami-chan without even thinking.
I grabbed her wrist and pulled her over to us again.
Then I have to be strong.
If I don't keep calm, the world will be destroyed!

name: Zakuro
message: "The crest of courage upon your heart... Your panache!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Now, Le Bret! Today, we travel to the moon!"

name: Zakuro
message: "I have no need for a machine's assistance. I'll simply dive off this building."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's right! That world upon the moon is...!"

name: Zakuro
message: "The souls of all those I admire wait for me upon the lunar surface..."

name: Zakuro
message: "The soul which comprises the fundaments of physical matter is―"

name: Zakuro
message: "This is truely a problem... Quoth Copernicus!"

name: Zakuro
message: "That's right. Why hath the whole been tempted by the devil?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Why hath the whole been tempted, lured onto that galley?"

name: Zakuro
message: "And now a traveler flying across the sky."

name: Zakuro
message: "You will feel the sting of your own words."

name: Zakuro
message: "But... I must go. I cannot keep him waiting."

name: Zakuro
message: "Look... The moonlight has come to welcome me..."
The two of them convulsed, trying to run away.
But I grabbed them both by the wrists so they couldn't run.

name: Zakuro
message: "We've made it through every crisis before, haven't we?"
I dragged the two of them along as I stepped over the handrail.
It felt like I could reach out and touch the heavens...

name: Zakuro
message: "You strip from me the laurel and the rose!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Take all! Despite you there is yet one thing I hold against you all."

name: Zakuro
message: "One thing that is left, that, void of stain or smutch, I bear away despite you."
I took one step out into the air.
The two of them tried to hold their ground.
But I took one step out into the air.
Let me dance for this new world.
I felt the two of them trembling.
I entrusted everything to the sky.
My body travelled from sky to Earth in an instant.
I grabbed their wrists, bringing them along with me into that abyss.
Those were the emotions upon their faces.
The world rotated in the silence.
The Earth knew me as it reached up to envelop us.
Just a little ways until we reach the world...
Just a little ways until we reach the Earth...
I saw my shadow upon the ground.
